characters.appearance: Young woman, mid-20s, slim build, fair skin, long wavy brown hair. Her facial features are consistent but appear slightly smoothed or filtered.
characters.wardrobe: Changes frequently: pink top with white cardigan, black/white patterned sweater, black dress, white turtleneck with green skirt, white blouse, white blazer.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Blonde wavy hair, blue eyes, fair skin.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: लोग कहते हैं "तुम्हारी English कितनी अच्छी है", पर सच बताऊँ? इसके पीछे बहुत practice छुपी है... [People say "Your English is so good", but to tell you the truth? There's a lot of practice hidden behind it...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the illusion of effortless fluency.
- Establishes a relatable, honest "older sibling" tone.
- Sets up the premise that good English requires behind-the-scenes work.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Fluent दिखना आसान है... (Looking fluent is easy...)
पर practice ज़रूरी है... (But practice is necessary...)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Office में सबको लगता है मैं आराम से बात कर लेती हूँ, लेकिन किसी भी presentation या meeting से पहले मैं घंटों practice करती हूँ। [Everyone in the office thinks I converse easily, but before any presentation or meeting, I practice for hours.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Contextualises the problem in a real-world professional setting (office/meetings).
- Validates the user's anxiety around speaking English at work.
- Shows that even confident speakers need preparation.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अकेले practice करने में problem ये है कि कोई ग़लती बताने वाला नहीं होता। Pronunciation सही है या नहीं, कैसे पता चलेगा? और private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं, है ना? [The problem with practicing alone is that there's no one to point out mistakes. How will I know if my pronunciation is right? And private tutors are very expensive, right?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the core pain point: solo practice lacks feedback.
- Mentions the barrier of expensive traditional English classes.
- Builds empathy with the learner's frustration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
ग़लती कौन बताएगा? (Who will point out mistakes?)
Private tutors बहुत महँगे हैं 💸 (Private tutors are very expensive 💸)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो मेरा secret है मेरा अपना AI Coach! आजकल मैं Supernova app यूज़ कर रही हूँ, और सच में... [So my secret is my very own AI Coach! Nowadays I am using the Supernova app, and honestly...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the accessible, modern solution.
- Positions the AI Coach as a personal, secret weapon for fluency.
- Shifts the tone from frustrated to excited and relieved.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मेरा AI Coach (My AI Coach)
Supernova app 👇 (Supernova app 👇)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसमें AI Coach मेरे pronunciation और sentences को real-time में check करके सही करता है। [In this, the AI Coach checks my pronunciation and sentences in real-time and corrects them.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core value proposition: real-time feedback and correction.
- Shows the app interface to build trust and prove the technology works.
- Keeps the explanation simple and benefit-driven.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट बात करो! (Just talk for 10 minutes daily!)
Hey! How's your evening going so far? Got any dinner plans?
Ooh, nice! What's your presentation about this time?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: ये सिर्फ रटे-रटाए sentences नहीं, बल्कि natural English बोलना सिखाता है। महँगी classes से कहीं ज़्यादा affordable है, और रोज़ AI Coach के साथ थोड़ी practice से आपका confidence एकदम बढ़ जाएगा। आज ही Supernova try करो, link नीचे है! [It doesn't just teach memorized sentences, but how to speak natural English. It's much more affordable than expensive classes, and a little daily practice with the AI Coach will completely boost your confidence. Try Supernova today, link is below!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Summarises the key benefits: natural speaking, affordability, and confidence building.
- Contrasts Supernova favourably against expensive traditional classes without aggressive hype.
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Natural English बोलना सीखें (Learn to speak Natural English)
Confidence बढ़ेगा! (Confidence will increase!)
काफी Affordable (Quite Affordable)
आज ही Supernova download करें! (Download Supernova today!)
